prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-RTSWFSASAS-40PC-40PC-BLCK Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Handheld Power Rotary Tool Set with Flexible Shaft Pencil Grip, Fully Adjustable Speed Description: This Rotary Tool set features everything you need to get started on your next crafting or home improvement project. The set features a rotary tool, a flexible shaft, and a 40pc accessories kit that includes mandrels, burrs, cutting, and polish wheels, and more. Everything you need to conquer your next DIY project comes with this variable speed 110V/60Hz rotary tool featuring 130W of power and an assortment of accessories.

Included Accessories:
- 1pc Brass Collet
- 1pc Chuck Lock Pin
- 2pc Mandrels
- 2pc Diamond Burrs
- 1pc Rubber Abrasive
- 2pc Twist Drills
- 1pc 3/8" x 3/4" Silicon Carbide Sharpening Stone
- 10pc Mounted Assorted Abrasive Stones with Mandrel
- 4pc Sanding Bands
- 8pc 1" Cut-Off Wheels
- 6pc 3/4" Cut-Off Wheels
- 1pc 1" Wool Polishing Wheel
- 1pc 1/2" Wool Polishing Wheel Search Terms: rotary tool kit rotary tool accessories rotary tool flex shaft cutting tool rotary tool kit with flex shaft flexible Features: - Hand Held Variable Speed Rotary Tool with Flexible Shaft Extension - Includes a 40 Piece Accessories Kit with Burrs, Brushes, Sanding Discs - UL and C-UL-US Approved; Instruction Manual - Flexible Shaft with 1/8" Chuck; Voltage: 110V/60Hz; Variable Speed: 80,00 to 30,000 RPM - Tool Case Dimensions: 7" x 12" x 4" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
